title: DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation
innovation_summary: DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation: We introduce DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that unifies high-throughput parallel generation with adaptive, load-aware verification.
